subject: Swift-BAT trigger 535733 is not astrophysical
body:
S.D. Barthelmy (GSFC), C.B. Markwardt (GSFC), J.A. Kennea (PSU)
on behalf of the Swift-BAT team report:

Using the data set from T-239 to T+455 sec from recent telemetry downlinks,
Swift-BAT trigger 535733 (GCN 13843) is not an astrophysical source.
It is a chance noise fluctuation in the image domain near the
location of SAX J1828.5-1037.
